# ssh-remote.txt
#
# Exercises af doctor --remote through a smart fake-ssh binary that
# responds to the exact SSH argv issued by af (ADR-041).  Verifies that
# internal/remote.SSH is correctly wired end-to-end into the af command
# tree without requiring a real SSH server.
#
# The default config emits -o ServerAliveInterval=60 before the host, so
# the fake must strip leading -o <value> pairs before reading the host.
#
# Three scenarios:
#   demohost   – all tools present; doctor exits 0.
#   sparsehost – required tools present, optional tools absent; doctor exits 0.
#   failhost   – ssh returns 255; all probes fail; doctor exits 1.

env HOME=$WORK/home

# ── Smart fake ssh ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# smfake/ssh is written from the txtar archive below.
# chmod makes it executable; prepending $WORK/smfake to PATH overrides
# the global stub at $WORK/fakebin/ssh for all subsequent exec calls.
chmod 0755 smfake/ssh
env PATH=$WORK/smfake:$PATH

# ── Case 1: all tools present on demohost ─────────────────────────────
exec af doctor --remote demohost
stdout 'Remote environment \(demohost\):'
stdout '✓ git'
stdout '✓ tmux'
stdout '✓ pi'
stdout '✓ claude'
stdout '✓ codex'
stdout 'Status: all required tools present'

# ── Case 2: optional tools absent on sparsehost ───────────────────────
# Required tools (TierMust) are present, so exit is still 0.
# Optional tools (TierShould/TierNice) are absent and shown with ⚠.
exec af doctor --remote sparsehost
stdout '✓ git'
stdout '✓ tmux'
stdout '⚠.*slicer.*not in PATH'
stdout '⚠.*delta.*not in PATH'
stdout 'Status: all required tools present'

# ── Case 3: ssh connection failure on failhost ────────────────────────
# Every SSH probe fails (exit 255), so all TierMust tools appear missing
# and af doctor exits non-zero.
! exec af doctor --remote failhost
stdout 'missing required tool'

-- smfake/ssh --
#!/bin/sh
# Smart fake ssh for af doctor --remote integration tests (ADR-041).
#
# The default af config passes:  ssh -o ServerAliveInterval=60 <host> <cmd>
# Strip all leading "-o <value>" pairs to reach the host argument.

while [ "$1" = '-o' ]; do
  shift 2
done
host="$1"
cmd="$2"

# Simulate a network failure for failhost.
case "$host" in
  failhost)
    echo 'fake-ssh: connect to host failhost port 22: Connection refused' >&2
    exit 255
    ;;
esac

# ── Platform detection probes ─────────────────────────────────────────
# DetectRemotePlatform calls: uname -s, then cat /etc/os-release.
case "$cmd" in
  'uname -s')
    echo 'Linux'
    exit 0
    ;;
  'cat /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null || true')
    printf 'ID=ubuntu\nID_LIKE=debian\n'
    exit 0
    ;;
esac

# ── Tool probes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# RemoteLookup.LookPath:  command -v <tool> 2>/dev/null || true
# RemoteLookup.Version:   <tool> --version 2>&1 || true  (only if found)
case "$cmd" in
  # ---- TierMust: git ----
  *'command -v git'*)
    echo '/usr/bin/git'
    ;;
  'git --version 2>&1 || true')
    echo 'git version 2.50.0'
    ;;

  # ---- TierMust: tmux ----
  *'command -v tmux'*)
    echo '/usr/bin/tmux'
    ;;
  'tmux --version 2>&1 || true')
    echo 'tmux 3.5'
    ;;

  # ---- TierMust agent group: pi / claude / codex ----
  *'command -v pi'*)
    echo '/usr/local/bin/pi'
    ;;
  'pi --version 2>&1 || true')
    echo 'pi 1.0.0'
    ;;
  *'command -v claude'*)
    echo '/usr/local/bin/claude'
    ;;
  'claude --version 2>&1 || true')
    echo 'claude 0.2.0'
    ;;
  *'command -v codex'*)
    echo '/usr/local/bin/codex'
    ;;
  'codex --version 2>&1 || true')
    echo 'codex 0.1.0'
    ;;

  # ---- TierShould: gh, fzf (absent on sparsehost) ----
  *'command -v gh'*)
    case "$host" in
      sparsehost) ;;
      *) echo '/usr/bin/gh' ;;
    esac
    ;;
  'gh --version 2>&1 || true')
    echo 'gh version 2.92.0 (2026-04-28)'
    ;;
  *'command -v fzf'*)
    case "$host" in
      sparsehost) ;;
      *) echo '/usr/bin/fzf' ;;
    esac
    ;;
  'fzf --version 2>&1 || true')
    echo '0.44.0 (HEAD)'
    ;;

  # ---- TierNice: slicer, delta (absent on sparsehost; sbx removed per ADR-060) ----
  *'command -v slicer'*)
    case "$host" in
      sparsehost) ;;
      *) echo '/usr/local/bin/slicer' ;;
    esac
    ;;
  'slicer --version 2>&1 || true')
    echo 'slicer 0.1.0'
    ;;
  *'command -v delta'*)
    case "$host" in
      sparsehost) ;;
      *) echo '/usr/local/bin/delta' ;;
    esac
    ;;
  'delta --version 2>&1 || true')
    echo 'delta 0.16.0'
    ;;
esac
